title: ConvSim Debrief
description: Structure of the debrief report generated after a completed session.

session_id.description: UUID of the session this debrief covers.

scores.description: Map of rubric dimension id to score (0-100).

missed_opportunities.description: Specific moments where a different response could have improved the outcome.

turning_points.description: Key moments in the conversation that significantly shifted the outcome.

replay_suggestions.description: Specific adjustments worth trying in a replay.

npc_final_state.description: NPC state variable values at end of session.

summary.description: Short paragraph summarising the session outcome and overall performance.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when debrief was generated.

used_fallback.description: True if the narrative was generated from a template rather than an LLM call.

metrics.description: Telemetry metrics computed from the session transcript. Pure, deterministic over the same transcript.

metrics_version.description: Schema version for the metrics block.

talk_ratio.description: Fraction of total words spoken by the player (0 = player said nothing, 1 = NPC said nothing).

words_per_turn_player.description: Mean word count per player turn.

words_per_turn_npc.description: Mean word count per NPC turn (excluding the opening).

open_questions.description: Number of open-ended questions asked by the player.

closed_questions.description: Number of closed (yes/no) questions asked by the player.

filler_word_count.description: Total filler word tokens in player turns. Non-zero only for voice sessions (push-to-talk or hands-free) where STT tokens are available.

interruption_count.description: Number of VAD-detected overlaps where the player began speaking before the NPC finished. Reserved; always 0 until VAD overlap events are stored.

response_latency_p50_ms.description: Median NPC response latency in milliseconds (player turn submitted → NPC turn persisted). Null when fewer than one complete turn pair exists.

response_latency_p95_ms.description: 95th-percentile NPC response latency in milliseconds. Null when fewer than one complete turn pair exists.

state_arc.description: Ordered per-turn snapshots of cumulative scenario state variable values after each NPC response.

state.description: Map of state variable name to current value (0–100 integer).
